name: Pau D'arco
summary: It should be framed conservatively because popular claims often exceed the evidence and preparation differences matter.
description: It should be framed conservatively because popular claims often exceed the evidence and preparation differences matter.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
contraindications: anticoagulant or antiplatelet medication such as warfarin or clopidogrel due to lapachol content that may inhibit vitamin K-dependent clotting and increase bleeding risk
pregnancy or breastfeeding or use in children without clinician guidance
pre-existing liver or kidney disease due to limited human safety data at concentrated doses
scheduled surgery due to bleeding risk and should be discontinued at least two weeks beforehand

sources.title: Pau d'arco activates Nrf2-dependent gene expression via the MEK/ERK-pathway

dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Preparation varies by tradition and product form and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
